intro.hr: Praktican vodič za kupnju pića, cigara i pribora u Hrvatskoj: gdje app moze dati izravan link, gdje smije dati samo referencu i kako planirati bez panike.
intro.en: A practical guide to buying drinks, cigars and accessories in Croatia: where the app can give a direct link, where it can only give a reference, and how to plan without panic.

title.hr: I. Zakon i praksa za duhan

body.hr:
Duhan u Hrvatskoj nije ista kupnja kao boca ruma. Online košarica za cigare nije normalan put kupnje; app zato razlikuje informaciju od transakcije.

Pravila za pocetak
• Prodaja duhanskih proizvoda na daljinu u Hrvatskoj nije kanal na koji se treba oslanjati; cigare planiraj kupiti u ovlastenoj ili specijaliziranoj trgovini.
• Cijene cigara u appu citaj kao orijentir: stvarna dostupnost ovisi o trgovini, zalihi i trenutnom uvozu.
• Ako si turist ili kupujes poklon, prvo nazovi trgovinu. Jedna minuta poziva stedjet ce obilazak grada.
• Ne narucuj duhan s nasumicnih marketplace stranica. Rizik je zakon, carina, stanje robe i nepoznat izvor.

Praksa na terenu
• U velikim gradovima računaj na bolji izbor, ali i na brže nestajanje popularnih formata.
• Kutiju pogledaj mirno: cellophane, wrapper, stopalo i opći miris govore vise od fotografije.
• Ako trgovina drzi humidor uredno i zna reci kada je stigla roba, to vrijedi vise od male razlike u cijeni.
body.en:
Tobacco in Croatia is not bought like a bottle of rum. An online cart for cigars is not the normal purchase path, so the app separates information from transaction.

Rules to start with
• Do not rely on distance sales of tobacco products in Croatia; plan to buy cigars in an authorised or specialised physical shop.
• Read cigar prices in the app as guidance: real availability depends on the shop, stock and current import.
• If you are visiting or buying a gift, call the shop first. One minute on the phone saves a city walk.
• Do not order tobacco from random marketplace pages. The risks are law, customs, product condition and unknown source.

Field practice
• Bigger cities usually mean better choice, but popular formats also disappear faster.
• Inspect the box calmly: cellophane, wrapper, foot and general aroma say more than a photo.
• A shop that keeps a stable humidor and can say when stock arrived is worth more than a tiny price difference.

body.hr:
Piće je jednostavnije: legalna online kupnja postoji, ali dobra kupnja i dalje trazi kartu. Kreni od kategorije, zatim od stila, pa tek onda od etikete.

Kako mapirati bocu
• Rum: provjeri stil prije drzave. Jamajka, Barbados i demerara nisu isto iskustvo ni kad cijena izgleda slicno.
• Whisky: prvo odluci koliko dima zelis. Islay i njezni Speyside ne rjesavaju isti stol.
• Brandy i konjak: gledaj dobnu oznaku kao smjer, ne kao jamstvo. VSOP moze biti bolji izbor za pairing od skupljeg XO-a.
• Vino i fortificirana vina: porto, sherry, madeira i prosek cesto daju bolji most s cigarom od jos jedne jake zeste.

Kupovna rutina
• Otvori katalog u appu, filtriraj stil i cijenu, zatim usporedi nekoliko trgovina.
• Ako app ima konkretan link, koristi ga kao precicu, ali cijenu i zalihu potvrdi na stranici trgovine.
• Za poklon ili veceru biraj sigurnu sredinu: poznat stil, cista deklaracija, boca koju bi otvorio i bez gostiju.
body.en:
Drinks are simpler: legal online buying exists, but good buying still needs a map. Start with the category, then the style, and only then the label.

How to map a bottle
• Rum: check style before country. Jamaica, Barbados and demerara are not the same experience even when prices look close.
• Whisky: decide how much smoke you want first. Islay and gentle Speyside do not solve the same table.
• Brandy and cognac: read age terms as direction, not guarantee. VSOP can pair better than a more expensive XO.
• Wine and fortified wine: port, sherry, madeira and dessert wine often bridge a cigar better than another heavy spirit.

Buying routine
• Open the app catalogue, filter by style and price, then compare several shops.
• If the app has a concrete link, use it as a shortcut, but confirm price and stock on the retailer page.
• For a gift or dinner, choose the safe middle: a known style, clear declaration and a bottle you would open without guests.

title.en: III. The tobacco map is reference only

body.hr:
Karta duhana u appu sluzi za orijentaciju: zemlja, marka, linija, snaga i format. Ne tretiraj je kao obecanje da je taj komad danas u ladici trgovine.

Kako koristiti referencu
• Zemlja nije presuda. Kuba, Nikaragva, Dominikana i Honduras imaju obiteljski stil, ali svaka linija moze odstupiti.
• Vitola mijenja iskustvo. Robusto i toro iste linije nisu samo razlicita duljina; mijenja se ritam, temperatura i omjer wrappera.
• Snaga i tijelo nisu isto. Jaca cigara nije nuzno punija, a puno tijelo ne mora znaciti nikotinski udar.
• Cijena po komadu pomaze budzetu, ali kutija trazi dodatnu provjeru stanja i datuma dolaska.

Prije odlaska u trgovinu
• Zapiši dvije zamjene po snazi i tijelu. Ako nema jedne linije, ne kupuj panično najskuplju dostupnu.
• Pitaj sto je stiglo svjeze, sto je dobro odlezalo i sto trgovac ne bi preporucio za tvoj termin pusenja.
• Ako kupujes za goste, uzmi vise blagih i srednjih formata nego jakih demonstracija.
body.en:
The tobacco map in the app is orientation: country, brand, line, strength and format. Do not treat it as a promise that this exact cigar is in a shop drawer today.

How to use the reference
• Country is not a verdict. Cuba, Nicaragua, Dominican Republic and Honduras carry family styles, but every line can differ.
• Vitola changes the experience. Robusto and toro from the same line are not only different lengths; pace, temperature and wrapper ratio change.
• Strength and body are not the same. A stronger cigar is not always fuller, and full body does not have to mean a nicotine hit.
• Price per cigar helps the budget, but a box needs an extra check of condition and arrival date.

Before visiting a shop
• Write down two substitutes by strength and body. If one line is missing, do not panic-buy the most expensive option.
• Ask what arrived recently, what has rested well and what the seller would not recommend for your smoking window.
• If buying for guests, take more mild and medium formats than strong demonstrations.

title.hr: IV. Kako citati cijenu i link u appu
title.en: IV. How to read price and links in the app

body.hr:
App ne glumi blagajnu. Link je pomoc za provjeru, a ne jamstvo dostupnosti. Najvaznije pravilo: Kupi znaci da postoji pouzdan product URL; ako ga nema, prikazuje se Traži online.

Sto znace gumbi
• Kupi — app ima pouzdan product URL do konkretne stranice proizvoda (kategorije i pretrage trgovine se ne racunaju). Otvori ga, pa provjeri cijenu, zalihu i dostavu.
• Traži online — app nema dovoljno pouzdan product URL. Tada sam pretrazujes naziv, tržište i trgovinu, bez pretpostavke da je prvi rezultat najbolji.
• drinkBuyLink — logika za pića namjerno daje izravniji put jer je online kupnja boca normalan kanal; kod duhana se češće ostaje na informaciji i fizičkoj kupnji.
• Cijena u appu — citaj je kao orijentir po odabranom tržištu, ne kao obvezu trgovca.

Dobra provjera
• Usporedi naziv, volumen ili vitolu, starost ili ediciju i fotografiju etikete prije placanja.
• Ako se cijena čini predobra, provjeri je li riječ o minijaturi, staroj stranici, rasprodanoj robi ili pogrešnoj ediciji.
• Za duhan uvijek potvrdi način kupnje i preuzimanja s trgovinom, jer app ne zamjenjuje zakonski kanal.
body.en:
The app is not a checkout. A link helps you verify, but it does not guarantee availability. The main rule: Buy means there is a trusted product URL; if there is not, the app shows Search online.

What the buttons mean
• Buy — the app has a trusted product URL to a concrete product page (shop categories and searches do not count). Open it, then check price, stock and delivery.
• Search online — the app does not have a trusted enough product URL. Search the name, market and shop yourself, without assuming the first result is best.
• drinkBuyLink — the drink logic intentionally gives a more direct path because online bottle shopping is a normal channel; tobacco more often remains information plus physical purchase.
• App price — read it as guidance for the selected market, not as a retailer obligation.

Good verification
• Compare name, volume or vitola, age or edition and label photo before paying.
• If the price looks too good, check whether it is a miniature, old page, sold-out item or wrong edition.
• For tobacco, always confirm the purchase and pickup path with the shop, because the app does not replace the legal channel.

body.hr:
Prvi kit ne treba biti skup; treba ukloniti stres. Kupi manje stvari koje ces koristiti svaki tjedan, a ne veliku kutiju opreme koja stoji kao dekor.

Osnovni komplet
• Rezač — dvostruka giljotina srednje cijene je bolja od egzoticnog alata koji ne znas koristiti.
• Upaljač — jet za vani, mekši plamen kad mozes mirno paliti. Uvijek imaj plin i rezervu.
• Pepeljara — stabilna, s utorom, dovoljno velika za cigaru. Salica i tanjur nisu dugorocno rjesenje.
• Voda i čaše — neutralna voda, jedna dobra čaša za destilat i jedna za vino ili fortificirano vino.

Sto preskociti na pocetku
• Veliki humidor bez navike mjerenja vlage. Bolje je koristiti malu kutiju ili pouch s kontrolom vlage dok ne znas tempo kupnje.
• Skupi nozevi, stalci i putni kovcezi prije nego znas koje formate najcesce pusis.
• Pet boca istog stila. Prvi bar neka ima kontrast: jedan rum, jedan whisky ili brandy, jedno fortificirano vino i jedna bezalkoholna opcija.
body.en:
A first kit does not need to be expensive; it needs to remove stress. Buy fewer things you will use every week, not a large box of gear that becomes decor.

Basic setup
• Cutter — a mid-priced double guillotine is better than an exotic tool you do not know how to use.
• Lighter — jet flame outdoors, softer flame when you can light calmly. Always keep gas and a backup.
• Ashtray — stable, notched and large enough for a cigar. A cup or plate is not a long-term solution.
• Water and glasses — neutral water, one good spirits glass and one glass for wine or fortified wine.

What to skip at first
• A large humidor before you have the habit of measuring humidity. A small box or pouch with humidity control is better until you know your buying pace.
• Expensive knives, rests and travel cases before you know which formats you smoke most often.
• Five bottles of the same style. Let the first bar have contrast: one rum, one whisky or brandy, one fortified wine and one non-alcoholic option.

body.hr:
Dobra kupnja ovisi o sezoni. Ljeto trazi drugu logistiku od zime, a blagdani prazne police brze nego sto app moze osvjeziti biljesku.

Planiranje sezone
• Ljeti pazi na toplinu. Boce prezive dostavu lakse od cigara; duhan ne ostavljaj u autu, na suncu ili u torbi cijeli dan.
• Zimi racunaj na darovne setove, ali i na brze nestajanje popularnih boca prije blagdana.
• Prije godisnjeg odmora kupi ranije. Zadnji dan obicno znaci kompromis, a ne najbolji izbor.
• Za terase biraj formate od 30 do 60 minuta i pića koja dobro rade malo hladnija.

Zaliha kod kuce
• Drzi manje, ali smisleno: nekoliko blagih, nekoliko srednjih, jednu jacu cigaru i dvije boce koje pokrivaju razlicite stolove.
• Rotiraj starije komade prema naprijed. Kolekcija je za koristenje, ne samo za brojanje.
• Ako nemas stabilnu vlagu, ne kupuj kutiju samo zato sto je popust. Popust nestane ako roba strada.
body.en:
Good buying depends on season. Summer needs different logistics from winter, and holidays empty shelves faster than the app can refresh a note.

Season planning
• In summer, watch the heat. Bottles survive delivery more easily than cigars; do not leave tobacco in a car, sun or bag all day.
• In winter, expect gift sets, but also fast disappearance of popular bottles before holidays.
• Before vacation, buy early. The last day usually means compromise, not the best choice.
• For terraces, choose 30 to 60 minute formats and drinks that work slightly cooler.

Home stock
• Keep less, but make it coherent: a few mild cigars, a few medium cigars, one stronger cigar and two bottles that cover different tables.
• Rotate older pieces forward. A collection is for use, not only counting.
• If you do not have stable humidity, do not buy a box only because it is discounted. The discount disappears if the product suffers.

body.hr:
Poklon treba biti upotrebljiv i obziran. Najskuplje nije uvijek najljubaznije; dobar poklon zna kome ide, kada ce se otvoriti i koliko iskustva primatelj ima.

Kako birati
• Za pocetnika: blaga ili srednja cigara, pristupacan rum, brandy ili porto, plus kratka biljeska kako poslužiti.
• Za znalca: pitaj kategoriju koju voli, a zatim nadji zanimljivu bocu ili format koji ne forsira njegov ukus u drugom smjeru.
• Za domacina: poklon koji se moze otvoriti odmah. Ako donosis cigare, donesi i informaciju o snazi i trajanju.
• Za nekoga tko ne pusi: ne poklanjaj duhan kao zadatak. Bolja su čaša, knjiga, kava, fortificirano vino ili neutralan pribor.

Detalji koji vrijede
• Sacuvaj racun ili barem naziv trgovine, osobito ako je poklon boca s mogućom zamjenom.
• Ne skidaj svu ambalazu ako primatelj mozda zeli provjeriti podatke.
• U appu označi ideju na listi želja, ali prije kupnje ponovno provjeri Kupi ili Traži online pravilo.
body.en:
A gift should be usable and considerate. The most expensive option is not always the kindest; a good gift knows who receives it, when it will be opened and how much experience the person has.

How to choose
• For a beginner: a mild or medium cigar, approachable rum, brandy or port, plus a short note on how to serve it.
• For an enthusiast: ask which category they like, then find an interesting bottle or format that does not force their taste in another direction.
• For a host: a gift that can be opened immediately. If you bring cigars, include strength and duration information.
• For someone who does not smoke: do not give tobacco as homework. A glass, book, coffee, fortified wine or neutral accessory is better.

Details that matter
• Keep the receipt or at least the shop name, especially if the gift is a bottle that might be exchanged.
• Do not remove all packaging if the recipient may want to verify details.
• Mark the idea on the app wishlist, but before buying check the Buy or Search online rule again.
